memberdef.argsstring: (struct rtio *r, struct rtio_iodev *iodev, const struct spi_buf_set *tx_bufs, const struct spi_buf_set *rx_bufs, struct rtio_sqe **last_sqe)
memberdef.name: spi_rtio_copy

briefdescription.para: Copy the tx_bufs and rx_bufs into a set of RTIO requests.

parameterdescription.para: last sqe submitted, NULL if not enough memory

briefdescription.para: Signal that the current (ctx->txn_curr) submission has been completed.

parameterdescription.para: Completion status, negative values are errors
Next submission is ready to start
No more submissions to work on

briefdescription.para: Submit, atomically, a submission to work on at some point.

parameterdescription.para: Next submission is ready to start
No new submission to start or submissions are in progress already

memberdef.argsstring: (struct spi_rtio *ctx, const struct spi_config *config, const struct spi_buf_set *tx_bufs, const struct spi_buf_set *rx_bufs)
memberdef.name: spi_rtio_transceive

briefdescription.para: Perform a SPI Transfer (transceive) in a blocking call.

detaileddescription.para: Provides a compatible API for the existing spi_transceive API by blocking the caller until the operation is complete. For details see spi_transceive.
Default RTIO SPI implementation for drivers who do no yet have native support. For details, see spi_iodev_submit.
